title: Angle Brackets for Wood Corner Bracket Galvanised L Shaped Brackets for Fixing and Repairing Furniture, Small Shelves, Windows, and Cabinets | 25mm x 25mm 16 Pcs
features: Package Details: One pack of metal L bracket includes 16 pcs x metal angle brackets and 64 pcs x fixing screws

Galvanised Iron: Manufactured with durable and sturdy galvanised iron material, these corner brackets for wood are durable and rust-resistant; provide a firm and strong support for fixings and repairing
Perfect Size: Angle brackets measuring 25mm x 25mm are great for wide range of applications; suitable to use both indoors and outdoors
Multi-Purpose Repair Brackets: Sturdy 90° angle brackets are suitable for repairing drawers, small shelves, cabinets racks, furniture legs, floating racks, bookshelves, and wooden tables
Easy to Use: This bracket comes with fixing screws that makes it super easy to install; Perfect for home and professional use

Angle Brackets for DIY Merchant video How to install these brackets? Mark the spot Drill a hole at the marked point. Drill the hole Drill a hole at the marked point. Screws the screw Screw in the screw to secure the bracket. It's done The angle bracket installation is complete. Can I use angle brackets on uneven surfaces? Angle brackets work best on flat surfaces. If the surface is uneven, the bracket might not sit flush, reducing its effectiveness and stability. Do I need special tools to install angle brackets? No special tools are needed. You usually just need a drill or screwdriver to attach them using screws. Can Winsome angle brackets be used outdoors? Yes, our angle brackets are made from rust-resistant materials like galvanized steel, and they can be used outdoors. Do Winsome angle brackets come with screws? Yes, 16-piece brackets come with 64 screws, and 32-piece brackets come with 128 screws. Are angle brackets reusable? Yes, you can reuse angle brackets if they’re still in good condition. Just remove them carefully to avoid bending or damaging them.
